debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l : List (List α)
l1 : List α
idx idx1 : ℕ
hidx : idx < l.length
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
⊢ ∃ idx',
    (l.set idx (l1.eraseIdx idx1)).flatten = (l.set idx l1).flatten.eraseIdx ↑idx' ∧
      l1[idx1] = (l.set idx l1).flatten[idx']

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simp at hidx ⊢
        refine ⟨⟨idx1, by simp [hidx1]⟩, ?_⟩
        simp [hidx1, List.eraseIdx_append_lt, List.getElem_append_left]
    | succ idx' HR =>
      cases l with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons hd tl =>
        simp at hidx ⊢
        obtain ⟨i, h1, h2⟩ := HR hidx
        refine ⟨⟨hd.length + i.1, by simp [i.2]⟩, ?_⟩
        simp [h1, h2, List.eraseIdx_append_ge, List.getElem_append_right]
